profiles.name: AA default cache blend
profiles.description: Artificial Analysis' current blended price convention: 7 cached-input, 2 fresh-input, 1 output.

profiles.name: Fresh chat
profiles.description: No cache assumptions; useful for one-shot prompts and low-context comparisons.

profiles.name: Coding agent, warm cache
profiles.description: Long-lived agent sessions with repeated system prompt, tool schema, conversation prefix, and files.

profiles.name: Reasoning-heavy task
profiles.description: Higher generated-token share for tasks where hidden reasoning and long answers dominate.

profiles.name: Long context review
profiles.description: Large repeated context with short edits or judgments.
